accommodations.text: Provide a visual schedule for each class period.
accommodations.source_quote: visual schedule for each class period

accommodations.text: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.
accommodations.source_quote: pair auditory alerts with a visual cue

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on tests and long assignments.
accommodations.source_quote: 50% extended time on tests and long assignments

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions.
accommodations.source_quote: pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions

accommodations.text: Give advance warning before transitions and changes in routine.
accommodations.source_quote: advance warning before transitions and changes in routine

accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
State task expectations explicitly and in writing.
accommodations.source_quote: state task expectations explicitly and in writing

accommodations.text: Provide graphic organizers for writing and note-taking.
accommodations.source_quote: graphic organizers for writing and note-taking

services.source_quote: Language processing support group 30 minutes twice weekly; provider TBD

services.provider_role: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing
services.source_quote: Deaf/hard-of-hearing itinerant support 30 minutes twice weekly
Specialized academic instruction reading 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently begin a classroom task within two minutes
